questions.text: Has a process of analysis of the needs that motivate the generation of records and establish the information to be collected been developed?
questions.category: MG01 - Identification, analysis and evaluation of needs that motivate the generation of records and information to be included

questions.text: Has a needs assessment process been developed that motivates the generation of records and establishes the information to be collected?
questions.category: MG01 - Identification, analysis and evaluation of needs that motivate the generation of records and information to be included

questions.text: Have the needs that motivate the generation of the records been adequately identified?
questions.category: MG01 - Identification, analysis and evaluation of needs that motivate the generation of records and information to be included

questions.text: Have the specific objectives of the registry been identified?
questions.category: MG02 - Identification of specific registration objectives

questions.text: Has it been clearly identified what is expected to be achieved with its collection?
questions.category: MG02 - Identification of specific registration objectives

questions.text: Has the scope of the record been defined, understood as the information to be recorded and the time for which the record will be maintained?
questions.category: MG03 - Identify the scope of the records, with the information to be recorded and the time to be kept in the system

questions.text: Have the retention and deletion periods of the records been determined taking into account the defined information disposition needs and applicable regulations, such as data protection regulations (GDPR)?
questions.category: MG03 - Identify the scope of the records, with the information to be recorded and the time to be kept in the system

questions.text: Have the pre-existing special needs of the specific regulations aimed at the financial sector that need to be met been taken into account?
questions.category: MG03 - Identify the scope of the records, with the information to be recorded and the time to be kept in the system

questions.text: Have the necessary records been generated to ensure that the information determined in the process of implementing the risk management system is collected?
questions.category: MG04 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 9: Risk management systems is collected

questions.text: Have the controls of the risk management system been taken into account with its associated evidence in order to obtain records where appropriate?
questions.category: MG04 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 9: Risk management systems is collected

questions.text: Have the necessary records been generated to ensure that the information determined in the process of implementing the post-market surveillance system is collected?
questions.category: MG05 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 72 necessary for the post-market surveillance system is collected

questions.text: Have the frequencies with which these records should be collected been properly documented and implemented?
questions.category: MG05 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 72 necessary for the post-market surveillance system is collected

questions.text: Have the necessary records been generated to ensure that the information determined to implement the defined human oversight mechanisms is collected?
questions.category: MG06 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 14 necessary for an effective human oversight is collected

questions.text: Has the need for these records been adequately documented and how to interpret their results for their contribution to the human oversight process?
questions.category: MG06 - Identify the records necessary to evidence that the information determined in Article 14 necessary for an effective human oversight is collected

questions.text: Has a log capture process been implemented to ensure that information is collected according to the criteria set out in the design phase?
questions.category: MG07 - Implement the record capture process

questions.text: Have tests been carried out to validate these procedures?
questions.category: MG07 - Implement the record capture process

questions.text: Have stress tests been carried out on the record capture system to ensure its smooth operation even in times of high demand?
questions.category: MG07 - Implement the record capture process

questions.text: Have the appropriate storage media and protective materials been selected and implemented to ensure the security and availability of the records?
questions.category: MG08 - Implement storage media to ensure availability of records

questions.text: Have storage media monitoring and review periods been established?
questions.category: MG08 - Implement storage media to ensure availability of records

questions.text: Have appropriate cybersecurity measures been selected and implemented to ensure the security and availability of records?
questions.category: MG09 - Implement security and cybersecurity means to ensure the protection of records

questions.text: Have periods of supervision and review of the cybersecurity and access control measures implemented been established?
questions.category: MG09 - Implement security and cybersecurity means to ensure the protection of records

questions.text: Are training and training processes developed for the personnel involved in the management of the registries?
questions.category: MG10 - Development of training and training of personnel involved in the management of registrations

questions.text: Are these training needs contemplated in the response to Article 4 of Literacy around AI?
questions.category: MG10 - Development of training and training of personnel involved in the management of registrations

questions.text: Has the impact of other applicable regulations or laws that may affect the registration process been analyzed and evaluated?
questions.category: MG11 - Analysis of the impact of other applicable regulations or laws such as GDPR data protection regulations that need to be considered in the generation of logs

questions.text: Specifically, has the impact of data protection regulations (GDPR) on the log generation process been analyzed and evaluated?
questions.category: MG11 - Analysis of the impact of other applicable regulations or laws such as GDPR data protection regulations that need to be considered in the generation of logs

questions.text: Have monitoring periods been established for storage media and the cybersecurity and access control measures implemented?
questions.category: MG12 - Establish periods of supervision and review of storage media and its cybersecurity

questions.text: Have review periods been established for the storage media and the cybersecurity and access control measures implemented?
questions.category: MG12 - Establish periods of supervision and review of storage media and its cybersecurity

questions.text: Have monitoring periods been established for storage media and the cybersecurity and access control measures implemented?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish a process for monitoring and continuous improvement of the records management system

questions.text: Have review periods been established for the storage media and the cybersecurity and access control measures implemented?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish a process for monitoring and continuous improvement of the records management system

questions.text: Has a process for monitoring and continuous improvement of the records management system been established?
questions.category: MG14 - Implement a process that ensures proper technical documentation of the records management system

questions.text: In the established monitoring and continuous improvement process, are possible errors monitored and identified and the data recorded for the implementation and continuous improvement of the proposed solutions evaluated?
questions.category: MG14 - Implement a process that ensures proper technical documentation of the records management system
